title: Section 5
content: Section 3 and all rules made thereunder shall cease to have effect on the expiration of 1[fifteen years] from the commencement of this Act, but such cesser shall not affect the validity of any appointment previously made in pursuance of the said rules.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 1 of 1969, s. 3, for "ten years" (w.e.f. 19-3-1969).
